jsonLd.title: Mamaearth is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Mamaearth! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Jabalpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Mamaearth:
Mamaearth is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mamaearth!
